prompt: Design a text-based hacking sim with terminal commands and network graph. Use code style from the first image and glowing node map from the second.
prompt_refined: Generate an image of a text-based hacking simulation interface. The main element should be a terminal window, styled with the distinct green text, monospace font, and command prompt appearance from image 1. The terminal window itself should feature the macOS-like frame, title bar, and control buttons as seen in image 1. Behind or integrated with this terminal, include a dynamic, glowing blue network graph, consistent with the interconnected nodes and luminous lines from image 2. The overall scene should convey a high-tech, cyber security environment.
objects: Text-based command prompt with green monospace styling
Dynamic glowing blue network graph, behind or integrated with the terminal
